items.title: google.dev
items.snippet:
The Gemini API has seen significant updates and new feature introductions, particularly with the rollout of the Gemini 3 series and enhancements across existing models and functionalities. This information is current as of March 25, 2026.

### 1. Clear, Comprehensive Answer

The Gemini API continues to evolve, with recent updates focusing on advanced multimodal capabilities, improved developer control, and enhanced billing features. Key developments include the introduction of the Gemini 3 serie

items.title: timesnownews.com
items.snippet:
Google AI Studio has received a significant update, introducing a new "vibe coding" experience powered by the **Antigravity coding agent**. This update, widely reported around March 2026, transforms AI Studio from primarily a prototyping tool into a platform for building full-stack, production-ready applications directly from prompts.

### Key New Features of Google AI Studio with Antigravity:

The Antigravity coding agent itself is a central component, designed to maintain a deeper understandin
